ruleset.name: Solubris Custom Rules
ruleset.description: Custom PMD rules for detecting code quality issues

rule.name: ExcessiveMockingOnSameObjectRule
rule.message: Excessive mocking on {0}: {1} calls detected. Maximum allowed: {2}
rule.description: Detects when a single mock object has excessive Mockito when() calls within a method. This can indicate that a test is testing too much or that the mock setup is overly complex.
